content.en:
Ultimately.

That Primary-Peer Divine Weapon was auctioned off by a seventh-stage Bone Transformation Realm powerhouse for 160 million primary-grade eternal ancient gold.

Not long after this first-class divine weapon was auctioned, another good thing was put up for auction.

"Next up for auction is a copy of the Golden Inscription of the Other Side, with thirty-six Golden Inscriptions of the Other Shore. The value of the Golden Text on the other side is higher than that of the Black Text on the other side, and the number has reached thirty-six. Therefore, the starting price this time is also very high, with a starting price of 50 million primary eternal ancient gold. "

The auctioneer said.

Jin Wen on the other side!

Ye Tian's heart moved.

He doesn't even have a single Golden Script on the Other Side now, and if he obtains these thirty-six Golden Scripts on the Other Side, then he can understand the writing system of the Golden Script on the Other Side.

Of course.

He is not the only one who is interested in the Bone Transformation Realm of Jin Wen on the other side, so the competition is absolutely fierce.

"The final transaction price of the Golden Inheritance on the other side may reach more than 200 million primary eternal ancient gold. "

Ye Tian guessed.

Of course, he had now sent a copy of the Haven on the other side, so he was not afraid that there would be no primary eternal gold.

He's definitely fighting to the end.

Soon, the auction began.

In a short period of time, the auction price soared to 100 million primary-grade eternal gold.

At this time, there were a lot fewer bone deformation realms in the auction.

After all, most of the Bone Transformation Realm didn't have such abundant funds, or they weren't interested in the Golden Inscription on the other side, and they were reluctant to spend so much Eternal Ancient Gold to bid.

At last.

Ye Tian only needed to compete with a few Bone Transformation Realm for the Golden Inheritance on the other side.

"Two hundred and thirty million primary-grade eternal gold!"

After Ye Tian quoted this bidding price, the other bone transformation realms gave up completely.

Although the golden inscription on the other side is very precious, the so-called inheritance is only the inheritance engraved on the stone on the other side, and it is not permanently preserved.

If you can't fully comprehend it, these golden texts on the other side will still disappear.

If it is a permanently preserved golden inheritance on the other side, it is worth spending ten times more.

"It worked!"

Ye Tian smiled.

With these thirty-six golden texts on the other side, he can comprehend the golden texts on the other side.

After that, another piece of incomparably precious treasures was auctioned.

After a long time.

Ye Tian's other side of the Haven was taken out for auction.

There were more than a thousand Haven Inheritances on the other side, such a terrifying number, which shocked many Bone Transformation Realms.

"I'll go, which force took out the inheritance of the Haven on the Other Side, and it has mastered so many Haven on the Other Side, it is definitely not an ordinary force. "

"Be sure to bid at all costs!"

"So much Haven on the other side is too important for our forces, and it must be taken!"

"There are a lot of competitors, and if you want to win it, you have to pay a lot of premiums to get it!"

"According to the normal price, so much Haven on the other side is at least 600 million primary eternal ancient gold, that is, 600,000 medium eternal ancient gold. But now it's an auction, and if you don't have 1 million medium permanent ancient gold, you don't want to win it!"

The starting price of these Horizontal Texts inheritance is 100 million first-grade eternal ancient gold.

Soon.

The auction is on!

Many bone transformation realms are bidding frantically, and the bidding price is soaring very quickly.

It didn't take long for the auction price to soar to 300 million primary-grade Eternal Ancient Gold, and there were still a bunch of Bone Transformation Realms bidding, as if these Eternal Ancient Gold were just a number.

"These bone transformation realms should not represent themselves, but represent the forces behind them, otherwise the general bone transformation realm would not spend so much money to bid for so many havens on the other side. There are too many of them to understand on their own, and in the end it can only be wasted. If it is a huge force, it can make a large number of bone transformation realm comprehensions, and it will be able to master so many other side of the Haven in a certain period of time!"

Ye Tian muttered.

It didn't take long for the bidding price to reach 600 million primary eternal ancient gold, and there were still some bone transformation realms bidding.

700,000,000,000 primary-grade eternal gold!

800,000,000,000 primary-grade eternal gold!

900,000,000,000,000 primary-grade eternal gold

In the end, the transaction price reached 1.1 billion primary eternal gold, which is equivalent to 1.1 million medium eternal gold.

"I didn't expect the transaction price to be so high!"

Ye Tian was overjoyed.

However, one percent of them will be taken away by the Eternal Night Pavilion, but he will also receive 990,000 medium eternal ancient gold.

Before you know it, the auction of the Eternal Night Pavilion has come to an end, that is, the auction of the three finale items.

In this regard, Ye Tian was very curious about what the finale item of this auction was.

At this point, the first finale item is presented.

Wow!

The finale item opens, revealing a spear.

The auctioneer introduced: "The first finale item of the auction is the High Beyond Divine Weapon, which is also a very famous High Divine Soldier of the Eternal Shore - the Spear of Nona, which has had many owners, and is a strong man who has been famous for countless years in the Eternal Shore. Now, although this spear of Gennona is somewhat damaged, it does not affect its fighting. Therefore, the starting price was set at three billion primary eternal gold. "

This price is terrifying, and Ye Tian is not eligible to participate in the auction.

However, the bone metamorphosis that qualifies for bidding naturally exists.

Soon.

A Bone Transformation Realm of a special private room participated in the auction, and their personal wealth was terrifying, so they could afford to bid.

At last.

A mysterious Bone Transformation Realm bid for this spear of Nona at a high price of 9.3 billion.

"The price is really horrible!"

Ye Tian sighed.

After the Spear of Nona was auctioned, a second finale item appeared.

"The second finale item in the auction next is a high-grade Golden Fruit from a special world in the Land of Eternity, which can help ordinary Eight Bone Transformation Realms to impact Nine Bone Transformation Realms, with a success rate of fifty percent. The starting price is 6 billion Primary Eternal Ancient Gold, and the auction is now open!"

The auctioneer said.

The best golden fruit on the other side!

When many powerhouses of the Eight Bone Transformation Realm heard this, their hearts were immediately excited.

Even some of the Boundary-Breaking Geniuses of the Seventh-Time Bone Transformation Realm and the Ancient Geniuses of the Sixth Bone Transformation Realm were very excited and joined the auction one after another.

Although there is only a 50% chance, if it is combined with other treasures, there is hope that the success rate will be increased to more than 50%, or even 70% or 80%!

Therefore, they will bid for the superior golden fruit at all costs.

"The golden fruit of the superior shore, a good thing!"

Ye Tian also wanted such a good thing, but he couldn't afford to bid at all, so he could only watch them bid.

At last.

The Golden Fruit of the Superior Shore was auctioned by a mysterious Bone Transformation Realm at a terrifying price of 18 billion primary-grade eternal ancient gold.

Subsequently.

The last finale item was put up for auction.

In full view, the finale item was unveiled.
